title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF SAMBAT ELEMENTARY SCHOOL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF SANTA TERESITA, PROVINCE OF BATANGAS, TOPAARALANG SENTRAL NG SANTA TERESITA.

chunks.text:
H. No. 11817 / 62 OG No. 45, 8397 (November 7, 1966)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 4489, June 19, 1965 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF SAMBAT ELEMENTARY SCHOOL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF SANTA TERESITA, PROVINCE OF BATANGAS, TO

PAARALANG SENTRAL NG SANTA TERESITA

.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of Sambat Elementary School in the Municipality of Santa Teresita, Province of Batangas, is hereby changed to

Paaralang Sentral ng Santa Teresita

.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 19, 1965.
